positive: Minimalist silhouette of a celestial raccoon perched on a crescent moon, rendered in high contrast black ink on a creamy parchment background. The style is mid-century modern graphic design, evoking the feel of vintage astro-botanical prints. The raccoon is stylized with geometric shapes, surrounded by stylized constellations and faint swirling nebulae elements. Composition is perfectly centered and balanced, emphasizing negative space. Lighting is flat, graphic, and highly defined, allowing for clean, solid color blocking. Color palette is restricted to deep midnight blue, celestial gold leaf accents, and solid black. Print-friendly, vectorized aesthetic.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, low detail, distracting background elements
